tamago_update.highlight: TamaGo: bare-metal Go runtime; proposal for upstream acceptance in Go 1.27
Experimental branch removes A and D RISC-V extensions; runs in 5-6MB RAM

execution_witness_specs.highlight: First execution witness spec released with 12,000+ test fixtures
Spec validated against RETH; bugs found in both RETH and specs

guest_program_specs.highlight: First draft guest program specs published; using SSZ for serialization
Stateless input/output fields added to fixtures for early experimentation

zkvm_standards.highlight: Three standards accepted: RV64IM target, I/O interface, crypto acceleration C API
Execution termination semantics ready to accept; memory layout needs review

proving_infrastructure.highlight: 4x4 GPU cluster (16 GPUs) in preparation for benchmarking
Proof Node API drafted: request proof, SSE subscription, deterministic retrieval

benchmarking_updates.highlight: Fusaka support added to benchmark tests; dashboard updated with latest results
Proof verification dashboard released; measures on EIP-7870 compliant hardware

serialization_discussion.highlight: Engine API SSZ initiative: 20x performance improvement over JSON in worst cases
SSZ vs RLP debate ongoing; guest input encoding not finalized

action_items.action: Run execution witness fixtures; compare against canonical witness field
Review and provide feedback on memory layout restrictions standard

decisions.decision: RV64IM baseline required; 32-bit ZKVMs must migrate to 64-bit
ZKVM SDKs must be no_std compatible for bare-metal target
